---
title: "Kennedy Gitau Ngigi"
image: profile.jpeg
about:
  template: trestles
  links:
    - icon: envelope
      text: Email
      href: mailto:gitaukennedy678@gmail.com
    - icon: github
      text: GitHub
      href: https://github.com/gitaukennedy
    - icon: linkedin
      text: LinkedIn
      href: https://linkedin.com/in/kennedy-gitau-a242562b3
---

## Actuarial Analyst & Actuarial Data Scientist

My name is Kennedy Gitau Ngigi. I am a technically orientated Actuarial Science professional working towards accreditation with the Institute and Faculty of Actuaries, with papers CS1 and CM1 currently in progress.

I am also extensively experienced as a programmer and data science engineer. I have built complex predictive models, designed relational databases, structured backend APIs, and engineered everything you see on this website! All the applications and systems linked in the navigation bar above are my original projects, showcasing my ability to deliver complete, end-to-end data science and machine learning pipelines.

The combination of these core skills allows me to build robust, automated actuarial workflows. If you would like to upgrade your data infrastructure, optimize traditional actuarial systems, or deploy scalable machine learning architectures, please check out my work or get in touch.

---

## Technical Expertise & Scientific Stack

### 📊 Actuarial Science
* **Methodologies:** Loss Reserving, Liability Projections, Premium Pricing Frameworks, IFRS 17 Reporting Guidelines.
* **Professional Track:** Institute and Faculty of Actuaries (IFoA) — Papers CS1 (Actuarial Statistics) & CM1 (Actuarial Mathematics) in progress.

### ⚙️ Machine Learning & Systems Engineering
* **Languages:** Python (Pandas, NumPy, Scikit-Learn), R (Tidyverse, Stats), SQL (T-SQL, PostgreSQL).
* **Frameworks & UI:** FastAPI, Django, Streamlit UI Engineering, Postman API Testing.
* **Data Pipelines & Visualization:** Random Forest Classification, Regression Modeling, Power BI, Tableau, Advanced Data Validation.
